creator: fred.wilson@fuse.net
text:
Maintainer missed my point which was that if you build and install cups and make the changes the install says to make, cups does not work with the versions of lp, lpr, lpq that come with FreeBSD 6.2 and it would be helpful if all the required changes were documented. For example I don't have a configuration file named printtab and man/apropos/Google printtab reveals nothing relevant. The changes I made seem to work but maintainer says they will break some applications. 

Basically, try to make life easier for those of us who don't have the knowledge of a kernel developer. Don't assume "everyone knows" because sometimes they don't.

Fred
